title: LoraExplainResponse
description: JSON envelope returned by lora_db_explain_json. The executor is never invoked: even on mutating queries (CREATE / MERGE / SET / DELETE / REMOVE) this response describes the plan without producing side effects.

query.description: The exact query text submitted by the caller.

shape.description: Whether running this plan would (potentially) mutate the graph.

resultColumns.description: Result column names in projection order. Empty for plans without a top-level projection.

id.description: Stable physical-node id within the owning plan, or Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER for synthetic Union / UnionBranch wrappers.

operator.description: Operator label, e.g. NodeByLabelScan, Expand, Projection.

details.description: Human-readable details map. Values are opaque strings; do not parse them programmatically — internal expression / variable types are deliberately not exposed here.

estimatedRows.description: Reserved for a future cost model. Always null today.
